sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Six Flags takes the hint, replaces board chair
feed.summary: The article "Six Flags takes the hint, replaces board chair" reports that Cedar Point's parent company has named a new board chair. The article, published on March 25, 2026, at 01:58 PM EDT, provides this update without further details on the reasons or the new appointee. It is quite brief and appears to be more of a headline announcement.

feed.title: (FXC) Movement Within Algorithmic Entry Frameworks
feed.summary: The article discusses the algorithmic entry frameworks for Invesco Currencyshares Canadian Dollar Trust (NYSE: FXC), noting a neutral sentiment across all time horizons which suggests sideways price action. It highlights a 4.8:1 risk-reward setup, targeting a 1.4% gain with 0.3% risk, and outlines three distinct trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, Risk Hedging) generated by AI models for different risk profiles. The analysis provides key support and resistance levels, emphasizing a wait-and-see approach.

feed.title: Foxx development EVP Cui Haitao sells $14941 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cui Haitao, Executive Vice President of Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:FOXX), sold 3,291 shares of common stock for $14,941 on March 20, 2026. Following this transaction, Cui Haitao directly holds 133,307 shares, including both vested and unvested restricted shares. Additionally, Foxx Development recently appointed Michelle Jie Shen as a new director, effective December 22, 2025, with an annual fee of $60,000.

feed.title: Kroger grant fuels urban farming and education in West Louisville
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. Foundation has awarded a $25,000 grant to the Louisville Urban League’s Project Kilimo, an initiative focused on urban farming in West Louisville. This program aims to teach residents how to grow their own vegetables, cook healthy meals, and develop food entrepreneurship skills, addressing food insecurity in the community. Kroger employees also volunteered 40 hours to prepare the farm for spring planting, highlighting their commitment to supporting local food access.

feed.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) announced it will hold its annual meeting of stockholders on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. An audio webcast of the meeting will be available live through the Investor Relations section of the company's website. Texas Instruments is a global semiconductor company focusing on analog and embedded processing chips.

feed.title: TD Cowen lifts PT on Devon Energy (DVN) to $50 from $46 – here’s why
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Devon Energy (DVN) to $50 from $46, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment reflects a more positive outlook on the company's future performance, particularly in anticipation of improving oil and gas prices. The firm highlights Devon Energy's compelling valuation, strong inventory, and robust free cash flow generation as key factors supporting their higher price target.

feed.title: KeyCorp stock faces renewed pressure amid shifting banking sector dynamics and deposit competition
feed.summary: KeyCorp is facing renewed pressure due to intensified deposit competition and uncertain interest rate environments, leading to compressed net interest margins and scrutiny of its loan portfolios. Regional banks like KeyCorp are struggling with deposit outflows as customers seek higher-yielding alternatives, which is impacting the bank's profitability despite its strong commercial banking franchise. Investors are closely monitoring KeyCorp's ability to navigate these challenges, particularly given its exposure to commercial real estate and the evolving regulatory landscape, while also noting its solid dividend payout and strong capital levels.

feed.title: JetBlue (JBLU) Stock Surges 15% on Acquisition Rumors Involving United and Southwest
feed.summary: JetBlue Airways (JBLU) stock surged over 15% following reports that the company is exploring a potential sale to competitors like United Airlines, Alaska Air, and Southwest Airlines. The airline has engaged advisers and conducted analyses on how antitrust regulators might view various merger combinations. Despite past financial challenges, JetBlue maintains its focus on the "JetForward" initiative, aiming for significant operating profit improvements by 2027.

feed.title: PepsiCo Inc. stock faces steady demand pressures amid consumer slowdown in North America
feed.summary: PepsiCo Inc. (ISIN: US7134481081) is experiencing steady demand pressures, particularly in North America, due to a consumer slowdown, with investors closely watching volume declines and shifting spending habits. While product innovations like Lipton Sparkling Green Tea aim to diversify its portfolio, core demand issues in its main markets persist, testing the company's resilience. US investors consider PepsiCo a defensive consumer staple, appreciating its dividend consistency and global reach despite current challenges, but need to monitor North American volume trends closely.

feed.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (Nasdaq: TXN) will host its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders on April 16, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. An audio webcast will be available live through the Investor Relations section of the company's website, ti.com/ir, for remote attendees. This announcement ensures shareholders who cannot attend in person can still participate in the annual meeting.

feed.title: Amgen Named One of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere
feed.summary: Amgen has been recognized by Ethisphere as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies, highlighting its commitment to integrity and ethical business practices. This award acknowledges Amgen's dedication to operating ethically while advancing science for patients. The evaluation process involves Ethisphere's Ethics Quotient® framework, assessing the company's ethics, compliance, culture, and governance.

feed.title: Senator Hawley Investigating FICO Credit Score Pricing Practices and Urging FTC to Investigate as Well
feed.summary: Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) has initiated an investigation into Fair Isaac Corporation's (FICO) credit score pricing practices, specifically in the mortgage credit scoring market, citing significant increases in wholesale royalty fees. Hawley, acting as Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Subcommittee on Crime and a member of the Subcommittee on Antitrust, Competition Policy, and Consumer Rights, also urged the Federal Trade Commission to conduct its own investigation. He argues that these price hikes disproportionately affect first-time homebuyers and are enabled by FICO's near-monopoly, which was originally solidified by regulatory frameworks requiring FICO scores for government-sponsored enterprise transactions.

feed.title: ADP Study Highlights Job Insecurity And Implications For HR Outsourcing Demand
feed.summary: A recent ADP Research study reveals significant job insecurity globally, with only 22% of workers feeling strongly confident in their job security, despite low unemployment. This sentiment, particularly high in lower-paid, repetitive, and lower management roles, suggests a disconnect between headline labor data and actual worker feelings, likely due to concerns about AI and automation. For Automatic Data Processing (ADP), this trend could boost demand for its HR outsourcing and workforce management solutions, though potential risks include clients restructuring HR budgets or regulators imposing stricter controls on AI tools.

feed.title: Equinix stands as the best performing large-cap real estate stock YTD (VNQ:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is highlighted as the best-performing large-cap real estate stock year-to-date in 2026, with a 25.89% gain. This performance stands out against a subdued S&P 500 Real Estate sector, which is down about 0.7% YTD. Other strong performers include Iron Mountain (IRM) and Digital Realty Trust (DLR), while Realty Income (O) and W.P. Carey (WPC) hold "Strong Buy" quant ratings.

feed.title: Booking Stock Trades at a Discount to Its Free Cash Flow Outlook
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) is currently significantly undervalued, trading at a 37% discount to its intrinsic value despite strong Q4 2025 results, robust free cash flow growth, and a compelling capital return program. The article argues that market fears surrounding the Iran conflict and AI disruption are significantly mispricing the stock, creating an exceptional buying opportunity. A forthcoming 25-to-1 stock split is also expected to increase retail accessibility and further drive demand.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; A O Smith (NYSE: AOS) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 17 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of A O Smith Corp (NYSE: AOS) common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing confirms The Vanguard Group itself holds 0 shares after this disaggregation.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Co., Merck share gains lead Dow's nearly 300-point jump
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by nearly 300 points, primarily driven by significant share gains from Sherwin-Williams Co. and Merck. This positive movement indicates strong performance from key component companies within the index.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Partners With Ondo in Asset Tokenization Push
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton, a major asset manager with $1.7 trillion in AUM, has partnered with Ondo Finance to tokenize real-world assets (RWA), beginning with its ETFs. This collaboration aims to provide 24/7 trading, improved accessibility, and shorter settlement periods through Ondo Global Markets. The initiative is part of a growing trend where traditional financial institutions are leveraging blockchain technology for investment products.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering $875,000 in Uncapped Dual Directional Buffered Return Enhanced Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments are linked to the least performing of the Nasdaq-100 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, maturing on March 28, 2028. The notes are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return on appreciation or a capped return on depreciation (up to 20%).

feed.title: How Baupost’s Stake Buildup and New Coverage At Eagle Materials (EXP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Baupost has significantly increased its stake in Eagle Materials (EXP), alongside RBC Capital Markets initiating coverage with a "Sector Perform" rating. This increased institutional interest and analyst attention are reshaping the investment narrative for Eagle Materials, focusing on its mixed heavy and light building materials portfolio and capital discipline amidst debates about potential conglomerate discounts. The article suggests investors consider varying fair value estimates and specific risks like wallboard demand and regional exposure before drawing their conclusions.

feed.title: Assessing Enova International (ENVA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Strong Long Term Returns
feed.summary: Enova International (ENVA) has experienced recent share price weakness, with short-term declines, despite strong long-term returns over one, three, and five years. The company is considered undervalued by a common narrative, with a fair value of $193.71 against its current price of $137.38, driven by strong demand for digital lending and record originations. However, its P/E ratio is higher than the industry average, suggesting a mixed picture and potential risks related to regulatory changes and credit cycles.

feed.title: Ventas, Inc. Stock Hits Day Low of $81.96 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. experienced a significant stock decline, reaching an intraday low of $81.96, a 6.25% drop. Despite this short-term dip and recent weekly/monthly decreases, the company has shown strong long-term performance with a 6.62% year-to-date increase and a 20.99% annual return, outperforming the S&P 500. Key financial metrics highlight robust operational performance, including 252.11% net profit growth in June.

feed.title: AT&T Inc. (T) Leads Industry Collaboration with NVIDIA and Cisco
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (T) has announced a significant collaboration with Cisco and NVIDIA to advance AI-driven IoT, integrating edge AI compute, intelligent networking, and zero-trust security. This initiative aims to enable real-time decision-making in critical environments. Oppenheimer recently raised AT&T's price target to $32, reiterating an Outperform rating, noting the company's focus on convergence.

feed.title: Skillpoint Alliance Awarded $20K Grant to Expand HVAC / Plumbing and Manufacturing Classes to the Permian Basin
feed.summary: Skillpoint Alliance has received a $20,000 grant from the O’Reilly Automotive Foundation to expand its HVAC/Plumbing and Manufacturing classes into the Permian Basin. This initiative addresses the high demand for skilled trades in the region, providing free, fast training, job placement assistance, and follow-up support to individuals with limited economic opportunity. The expansion aims to bridge the workforce gap and help more Texans build stable careers.

feed.title: The MLB season starts tonight and T-Mobile's 5G is rewriting baseball's rulebook
feed.summary: T-Mobile's 5G private network will power MLB's new Automated Ball Strike (ABS) Challenge System, which goes live tonight for the first time in all major league ballparks. This system uses tracking technology to determine strike calls, with T-Mobile's 5G ensuring near-instant data delivery for challenges. Additionally, T-Mobile customers can claim a free MLB.TV subscription for the 2026 season, offering access to out-of-market games.

feed.title: CVS Caremark nears settlement with FTC as federal regulators target insulin pricing practices
feed.summary: CVS Caremark is nearing a settlement with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) regarding its insulin pricing practices. The FTC had previously accused "Big 3 PBMs" of influencing drugmakers to increase prices through a "rebate-chasing" scheme. This potential settlement comes as federal regulators continue to scrutinize the operations of pharmacy benefit managers like CVS Caremark.

feed.title: Franklin Covey (NYSE:FC) Given Outperform Rating at Barrington Research
feed.summary: Barrington Research has reissued an "Outperform" rating for Franklin Covey (NYSE:FC), setting a $25.00 price objective which suggests a potential upside of 68.58%. This comes despite the company missing its recent quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of -$0.27 against an estimated $0.03. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of shares, with some increasing their stakes recently.

feed.title: 10 Top Retail Companies to Know
feed.summary: The retail industry is diverse, encompassing mass merchandise leaders, apparel brands, and athletic powerhouses that operate thousands of locations with large workforces and complex supply chains. These companies offer various career paths requiring both soft skills and technical expertise. This article highlights some of the largest retailers demonstrating the massive scale of global operations.

feed.title: The Kraft Heinz Company (KHC) Announces 5-Year Partnership With the National Football League
feed.summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (KHC) has announced a five-year global partnership with the National Football League, making it the NFL's first-ever global condiment partner. This partnership aims to increase brand visibility at stadiums, through limited-edition packaging, integrated marketing, and retail activities, while also supporting the NFL's international expansion. Separately, discussions between Kraft Heinz and Unilever regarding a potential merger of parts of their food businesses have reportedly ended.

feed.title: JFrog Gains Momentum as New Registry and AI Moves Boost Stock
feed.summary: JFrog Ltd. (NASDAQ: FROG) stock has risen by 10.68% due to new AI initiatives, including an integration with NVIDIA and the launch of the Multi-Component Product (MCP) Registry, which enhance secure registry capabilities for enterprises. The company's financial health is supported by a strong gross margin and a $300M share repurchase program, signaling investor confidence. Analyst upgrades from UBS and Guggenheim reinforce a positive outlook, with a consistent $60 price target.

feed.title: Intel Corporation stock faces critical juncture amid AI chip race, foundry delays and CHIPS Act supp
feed.summary: Intel Corporation is at a critical juncture due to delays in its 18A manufacturing process, intensifying competition from TSMC and Nvidia in AI chips, and its strategic role in the US semiconductor revival backed by the CHIPS Act. While the delays raise market concerns, significant government funding and new partnerships suggest potential for Intel to leverage its position in AI and foundry services. US investors are watching closely, considering Intel's exposure to AI growth, its lower valuation compared to pure-play competitors, and the de-risking elements provided by government support.

feed.title: Textron Aviation To Showcase Full Range Of Aircraft At Sun ’n Fun
feed.summary: Textron Aviation will display its Cessna, Beechcraft, and Pipistrel aircraft together for the first time at the 2026 Sun 'n Fun Aerospace Expo. The exhibit will feature a comprehensive range of piston and turboprop models, including the debut of the Beechcraft King Air 360 Crimson Edition, commemorating 60 years of the King Air family. This combined showcase aims to provide a unified view of Textron's expanded product lineup and innovations across different aviation segments.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings (PYPL) announces the launch of PayPal USD across 70 markets
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings (PYPL) has announced the expansion of its stablecoin, PayPal USD (PYUSD), to its customers outside of the United States. This strategic move makes PYUSD available to users across 70 markets globally. The launch aims to facilitate faster and more affordable international money transfers using traditional payment rails and Web3 payment pathways.

feed.title: Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) prices 4.60% callable notes due March 2028
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) has priced Fixed Rate Callable Notes due March 27, 2028, with a 4.60% fixed interest rate, payable semi-annually. The public offering price is 100.00% with a 0.10% underwriting discount. These are senior, unsecured obligations and are callable by BAC starting September 27, 2026.

feed.title: DTE Energy billing issues: Customer payment trouble, what it means for next bill
feed.summary: DTE Energy has confirmed that a billing issue affecting many of its customers has been fixed. The Michigan Public Service Commission (MPSC) was in contact with DTE regarding the problem. Customers whose original payments did not go through and who did not take action may see a higher bill next month.

feed.title: Amex doubles down on AI for businesses
feed.summary: American Express is expanding its business offerings by integrating new AI tools and launching a new premium business card. The company plans to release several AI-powered features, including payment analysis, automated expense reporting, and an Insights Agent for corporate customers, aiming to simplify back-office operations and assist businesses navigating a volatile economic environment. Amex's strategy is to leverage agentic and generative AI to create a new generation of financial services, catering to businesses facing pressures from geopolitical instability and economic shifts.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Has Lowered Expectations for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Stock Price
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reduced its price target for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) from C$219 to C$205, maintaining a "sector perform" rating. This new target suggests an 8.02% upside from the current share price. The consensus among analysts is a "Hold" with an average price target of C$201.33, reflecting mixed ratings across various firms.

feed.title: Canaccord reiterates Generac stock Buy rating on data center growth
feed.summary: Canaccord Genuity has reiterated a Buy rating and a $275 price target for Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC), citing strong data center growth and alignment with financial outlook expectations. The company's data center backlog has significantly increased, and the Commercial & Industrial segment is projected to account for half of its revenue by 2028, reducing revenue variability. Despite a recent sell-off and premium P/E ratio, the firm advises investors to hold the stock, expecting the strategic shift to boost its multiple.

feed.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Arm, Intel, AMD, Firefly Aerospace, Robinhood, JD.com, Sarepta, and More
feed.summary: The article highlights stock movers for the day, including Arm, Intel, AMD, Firefly Aerospace, Robinhood, JD.com, and Sarepta. It notes that stocks were generally rising on Wednesday, driven by investor optimism for a rapid resolution to the Middle East conflict due to ongoing talks between the U.S. and Iran. The financial market's positive trend reflects this hope for geopolitical stabilization.

feed.title: Ball Corp. added as a new short idea at Hedgeye (BALL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Ball Corp. (BALL) has been identified as a new short idea by Hedgeye analysts. The firm expects the company to be significantly impacted by the escalating Iran conflict, facing mounting cost pressures and no clear immediate resolution.

feed.title: Blackstone Steps Into Sports With $1.78B Cricket Deal
feed.summary: Blackstone has made its first foray into professional sports by joining a consortium to acquire the Royal Challengers Bengaluru cricket teams (men's and women's) for $1.78 billion. This acquisition highlights the growing interest of private equity in global sports, particularly cricket, with the IPL being a major draw for investors. The deal involves prominent sports investor David Blitzer and signifies Blackstone's official entry into owning pro sports teams after previous considerations.

feed.title: Six Flags names new board chair amid ongoing leadership shakeup
feed.summary: Six Flags has named Richard Haddrill as its executive chairman, continuing a shakeup of its board of directors. The company reported a significant net loss of $1.6 billion for fiscal 2025 and is reorganizing leadership to address debt and portfolio performance. This move follows other recent leadership changes and comes amidst struggles for the theme park operator.

feed.title: First National (NASDAQ: FXNC) outlines 2025 capital strength and key risks
feed.summary: First National Corporation (FXNC) has filed its annual report for 2025, detailing its strong capital position, business operations through First Bank, and various risk factors. The company reported a significant increase in net income for 2025 compared to 2024, driven by higher net interest income and a decrease in merger expenses. FXNC also outlined its cybersecurity risk management and governance, emphasizing its robust capital ratios that exceed regulatory "well capitalized" thresholds.

feed.title: Gartner Investors Face Securities Lawsuit Over Alleged Misleading Growth Forecasts and Stock Drops
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) is facing a federal securities lawsuit claiming the company and two top executives misled investors about contract value growth and consulting revenue, leading to significant stock drops. The lawsuit focuses on alleged false statements between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, about accelerating growth and concealed headwinds. Accusations include unrealistic growth projections and undisclosed risks related to macroeconomic uncertainty and policy changes that reportedly caused the stock to decline twice.

feed.title: FTI: Susquehanna Raises Price Target to $82, Maintains Positive Rating | FTI Stock News
feed.summary: Susquehanna analyst Charles Minervino has reiterated a Positive rating on TechnipFMC (FTI), increasing the price target from $71 to $82. This adjustment reflects continued confidence in FTI's performance, following similar upgrades from other firms like Goldman Sachs and Citigroup. TechnipFMC, a provider of offshore oilfield services, has an average target price of $62.55 from 20 analysts, with a consensus "Outperform" recommendation, though GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $37.49.

feed.title: TechnipFMC PLC buy Susquehanna
feed.summary: Susquehanna maintains a "BUY" prediction for TechnipFMC PLC (FTI) with a current target price of €70.65, set to run until March 25, 2027. The firm recently raised its price target on FTI from $71.00 to $82.00, affirming a "positive" rating. The article also provides a history of Susquehanna's past predictions for TechnipFMC PLC, showing varying target prices and performance percentages.

feed.title: Frontline (NYSE:FRO) Shares Down 3.6% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Frontline PLC's shares dropped 3.6% on Wednesday, trading at $34.17 with lower-than-average volume. The company missed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates but increased its dividend, although its high payout ratio raises sustainability concerns. Analysts are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $31.62.

feed.title: FedEx (FDX) Faces Potential Impact from USPS Package Surcharge
feed.summary: The U.S. Postal Service has introduced an 8% surcharge on package deliveries due to rising fuel prices, a move that could affect FedEx's operational costs and pricing strategies. Despite this, FedEx (FDX) exhibits strong financial health with expanding operating margins and a robust market position, maintaining a market cap of $84.44 billion. While its valuation metrics show a mixed picture, analyst sentiment remains positive, though investors should monitor sector-specific risks like fuel price fluctuations.

feed.title: Raymond James reiterates Strong Buy on Lumexa Imaging stock
feed.summary: Raymond James has reiterated a Strong Buy rating and a $23.00 price target for Lumexa Imaging Holdings (NASDAQ: LMRI). The firm's updated valuation methodology suggests a total equity value of $1.5 billion, or $15.53 per share, significantly above the current market cap. This comes as Lumexa prepares for its first earnings call after pre-releasing strong preliminary revenue and adjusted EBITDA results.

feed.title: 5 Costco Deals Better Than Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026
feed.summary: Costco is offering several significant tech deals that are more advantageous than those found in Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026, which runs from March 25-31. These Costco deals often include lower prices, extended warranties, bundle inclusions, or better return policies. Notable products with superior Costco offers include a Dell 16-inch touchscreen laptop, a Sony 65-inch Bravia 5 Mini LED Smart TV, Enbrighten Outdoor Wi-Fi Eternity Lights, a Ring Home Kit, and Insta360 X5 and Ace Pro 2 cameras.
